GROW YOUR PORTFOLIO WITH CYC AI TRADER

Every day, the Binance Smart Chain ecosystem generates a trading volume exceeding $25 billion. To help Wealth Cycle community members profit from the vast liquidity pool within the ecosystem, the CYC AI trader has been developed. Its goal is to facilitate consistent earnings from the substantial liquidity pool within the Binance Smart Chain ecosystem.


WealthCycle AI Trader is designed to autonomously execute trades, monitor market conditions, analyze data, and make informed trading decisions based on pre-defined parameters and AI-driven insights

View Smart Contract

Why WealthCycle ?

Unlock the full potential of our product with our amazing and top-notch features.

Efficiency

Automation eliminates manual intervention and executes trades in real-time, capitalizing on market opportunities.

Data-Driven Decisions

AI analyzes extensive market data to make informed and data-driven trading choices.

Emotion-Free Trading

AI is not influenced by emotions, reducing the impact of human biases on trading outcomes.

24/7 Operation

The smart contract operates continuously, even when human traders are not actively monitoring the market.

Smart Contract Features

Key features of the WealthCycle smart contract and why it's best suited to grow your portfolio

Transparent Smart Contract

The foundational technology of the blockchain. It's a self-executing digital contract with predefined rules and conditions. In the context of crypto trading, the smart contract automates trade execution, eliminating the need for intermediaries.

Artificial Intelligence (AI)

AI algorithms are integrated into the smart contract to process and analyze vast amounts of historical and real-time market data. The AI evaluates trends, patterns, and indicators to make predictive and strategic trading decisions.

Autonomous Decision-Making

The AI-powered smart contract can autonomously execute buy and sell orders based on its analysis of market data. This process is guided by the parameters and strategies set by the contract's creator.

Risk Management

The AI can be programmed to include risk management protocols, adjusting trading strategies or halting trading activities if predefined risk thresholds are exceeded.

Adaptability

The AI can learn and adapt over time, refining its trading strategies based on the outcomes of past trades and changing market conditions.

Transparency and Trust

Since smart contracts are transparent and tamper-proof, all trading activities and decisions made by the AI are visible on the blockchain, ensuring trust among participants.

The WealthCycle roadmap

The roadmap to help you understand the current state of the smart contract and where it's headed 

Testnet

Q2 2023

The WealthCycle Testnet was deployed in Q2 2023 and the following tests where carried out; Sentiment Analysis, Pattern Recognition, Market Monitoring and Alerts, Portfolio Optimization, Liquidity Management, Data-Driven Auditing.

Mainet

Q4 2023

The WealthCycle mainet contract went live in Q3 2023, the mainet version was optimised to adjust trading strategies based on changing market conditions, allowing for adaptive responses to new information.

CYC ICO/Listing

Q1 2024

The CYC Token will undergo its public sale across several exchanges to expand to open its market to new holders, as the CYC token is required to run the WealthCycle smart contract on your account

CYC AI App

Q3 2024

The CYC AI BOT App would be launched, allowing crypto lovers globally to profit CYC and earn from the global transaction fees of the WealthCycle community

Frequently Asked questions

Hey there! Got questions? We've got answers. Check out our FAQ page for all the deets. Still not satisfied? Hit us up.

WealthCycle is a trading platform that is powered by the CYC AI Trader

The WealthCycle AI operates based on liquidity pools, which are pools of assets provided by users. These pools are used to facilitate trading between different pairs of assets (e.g., ETH/USDC, BTC/DAI). Users deposit CYC into the pools, and the volume of asset in the pool determines the user profit.
It incorporates artificial intelligence to enhance its performance. We use AI to optimize fee structures, managing liquidity, predicting price movements, and identifying arbitrage opportunities more effectively. Our Machine Learning algorithms analyze historical trading data and market conditions to make informed decisions and improve the WealthCycle AI efficiency.

Simply exit your active trading pool by "Leaving Pool"

You can only exit new pools after a 30 day lock period

Daily profits are influenced by the market trends from the preceding day. Our smart contract, driven by AI technology, computes updated pool ratios and trade-related prices. User earnings are credited to their pool balance every minute. The potential profit margin can vary between 5.3% to 11.8% within a 24-hour timeframe, contingent upon the level of activity in the market.

Yes, you earn a rebate commission daily which is generated by your referred affiliates.

You receive CYC bonuses for both new team referrals and your daily pool profit earnings

Disclaimer

Trading cryptocurrencies with the assistance of AI technology can offer potential benefits but also comes with risks. It's crucial to exercise caution, conduct thorough research, and only invest funds that you can afford to lose. The decision to engage in cryptocurrency AI trading should be made with careful consideration of your financial situation and risk tolerance. Always consult with financial professionals or legal experts for personalized advice.
